description_long: This is a simple, rustic wooden fence composed of two horizontal rails connected by two vertical posts. The rails are slightly uneven, giving the fence a handcrafted, natural appearance. The posts are rectangular and robust, providing structural support at each end. The wood is uniformly colored in a reddish-brown hue, suggesting it may be stained or painted for outdoor durability. There are no visible decorative elements, caps, or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The fence is low in height, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks without obstructing views.
description: A rustic, reddish-brown wooden fence with two uneven horizontal rails and two sturdy vertical posts, lacking decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing both horizontal rails and the two vertical posts, highlighting the uneven, handcrafted look.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the fence and the rectangular cross-section of the posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the rails and posts from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, again showing the narrow profile and the post's rectangular shape.
